arts.ttl: Man Utd in SEVEN-club Xavi Simons battle as demands revealed
arts.sum: The 21-year-old winger and attacking midfielder is currently playing on loan at the German top club, who are interested in his permanent signing. According to BILD, Leipzig have already contacted PSG for the signing of Simons.

arts.ttl: Furious Sporting Lisbon fans throw PYRO at their own players after their fourth defeat in five games since Ruben Amorim's departure for Manchester United
arts.sum: Sporting fans aimed pyrotechnics at their own players who stood to applaud them after the side suffered their fourth defeat in five games.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News Today: Romano BOMBSHELL, Gyokeres HINT, Real Madrid DEAL
arts.sum: All the latest Manchester United transfer news, rumours and gossip, as Fabrizio Romano reveals a likely January signing, Viktor Gyokeres nears the exit at Sporting CP and Marcus Rashford finds himself under threat. Around half the Manchester United squad is up for sale while the Red Devils are open to bids for attacker Marcus Rashford during the January transfer window, according to Sky Sport Deutschland .

arts.ttl: Man United confirm squad for Europa League contest against Viktoria Plzen, with two players back from injury
arts.sum: Manchester United confirm their 24-man squad for Thursday's Europa League contest against Viktoria Plzen, including Victor Lindelof and Toby Collyer.

arts.ttl: Pavel Sulc inspired by Wayne Rooney as Plzen aim to stun ‘mega club’ Man Utd
arts.sum: The midfielder has scored four goals in his last four appearances.

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker names major Man United problem Sir Jim Ratcliffe must fix like Sir Alex Ferguson did
arts.sum: MOTD host Gary Lineker believes the quality of Manchester United's squad has sunk so low that even Sir Alex Ferguson would not be able to win the title with it.

arts.ttl: 12 Manchester United that could be sold including Marcus Rashford

arts.ttl: What Diego Leon has said about Manchester United after £3.1m approach made
arts.sum: Manchester United are working on a deal to sign 17-year-old teenage sensation Diego Leon, who is currently playing his football in Paraguay with Cerro Porteno
